subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath turned towards His countenance, that he may rejoice and be numbered among the thankful ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله الی من اقبل الی الوجه لیفرح و یکون من الشاکرین سبحان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
